$conversationId..read: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('ParticipantIds').child(auth.uid).val() === true || data.child('BuyerId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('SellerId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('UtilisateurId').val() == auth.uid)
$conversationId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('ParticipantIds').child(auth.uid).val() === true || data.child('BuyerId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('SellerId').val() == auth.uid || newData.child('ParticipantIds').child(auth.uid).val() === true || newData.child('BuyerId').val() == auth.uid || newData.child('SellerId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('UtilisateurId').val() == auth.uid || newData.child('UtilisateurId').val() == auth.uid)
$conversationId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['AnnonceId', 'LastMessageTimestamp']) && newData.child('AnnonceId').isString() && (newData.child('ParticipantIds').hasChild(auth.uid) || newData.child('BuyerId').val() == auth.uid || newData.child('SellerId').val() == auth.uid || newData.child('UtilisateurId').val() == auth.uid)

$transactionId..read: data.child('ProprietaireId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('DemandeurId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('SenderId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('ReceiverId').val() == auth.uid
$transactionId..write: !data.exists() || data.child('ProprietaireId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('DemandeurId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('SenderId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('ReceiverId').val() == auth.uid
